loop1.title: Battery Health History
loop1.note: This asset is an electrical UPS meter; it does not measure battery-specific sub-scores (SOC, DC Bus Quality, Thermal, or Overall Readiness). The card's battery history slots are honest-blanked as these quantities are not logged by this asset.

loop1.title: Backup Readiness
loop1.note: Showing load factor as a proxy for readiness — this UPS meter does not measure battery capacity (Ah) or runtime data required for true backup time/headroom calculations.

loop1.title: Backup Readiness History
loop1.note: Showing load factor as a proxy for backup readiness — the UPS meter does not measure battery runtime, pressure, or headroom scores.

loop2: 'ups-asset-dashboard/battery-autonomy' answers the prompt as routed; these cards cover quantities not recorded for this asset and render honest-blank per-leaf with the reason: Battery Health History (This asset is an electrical UPS meter; it does not measure battery-specific sub-scores (SOC, DC Bus Quality, Thermal, or Overall Readiness). The card's battery history slots are honest-blanked as these quantities are not logged by this asset.).
